visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a grey coat stands in a Costco warehouse in front of an industrial freezer, gesturing and speaking towards the handheld camera. (2) The shot cuts to a close-up of a price tag for Pulmuone Kimchi & Vegetable Dumplings and the product boxes stacked on the freezer shelves. (3) The woman opens the freezer door, picks up a large bag of dumplings, and presents it to the camera while continuing her enthusiastic explanation. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen where four dumplings are placed inside a white Philips air fryer on aluminum foil; a hand reaches in to adjust the dial and start the 10-minute timer. (5) A close-up reveals the cooked dumplings in a grey bowl, appearing crispy and translucent, held up by pink chopsticks. (6) Two women sit at a dining table together, each holding a dumpling with chopsticks, eating them with happy expressions and giving a thumbs-up to the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Costco Wholesale. [Variety]: 回購之王. [Variety]: 我要買餃子. [Subtitle]: 你已經買很多次, 你回購了第四次. (2) [Variety]: 很好吃. [Subtitle]: 這已經變成2024年你的最愛, 2025還要買. (3) [Variety]: 就是除了好吃, 我不知道怎麼形容. (4) [Variety]: 超好吃. [Subtitle]: 這個真的很好吃. (5) [Variety]: 配飯或配麵. [Subtitle]: 他不用當正餐, 他就當那種小菜水餃. (6) [Variety]: 超好吃. [Subtitle]: 他那個泡菜超香. (7) [Subtitle]: 而且你只要氣炸鍋, 或者是你那個平底鍋. (8) [Subtitle]: 加油加水. (9) [Variety]: 歐買尬好吃. [Subtitle]: 真的很好吃. (10) [Subtitle]: 我半夜也會偷吃. (11) [Variety]: 399元超商折80. [Subtitle]: 建議大家折80的時候囤貨. (12) [Subtitle]: 平底鍋微波爐, 或者煎鍋都可以加熱. (13) [Subtitle]: 氣炸鍋花180度, 10分鐘開始. (14) [Subtitle]: 餃子煮好了. [Subtitle]: 餃子的皮非常的薄. (15) [Subtitle]: 可以看到裡面的餡料哦. (16) [Subtitle]: 然後呢裡面的口感非常的脆. (17) [Subtitle]: 有醃白蘿蔔, 然後泡菜跟一些冬粉. (18) [Variety]: 味道非常香濃. [Subtitle]: 味道非常的香濃. [Subtitle]: 然後泡菜也非常的十足. (19) [Subtitle]: 它是用真的韓國泡菜去做的. (20) [Subtitle]: 非常適合下酒菜, 或者是配拉麵. (21) [Subtitle]: 這種就是煎個一兩顆超夠味. [Variety]: 買. (22) [Subtitle]: 而且每一顆都超大的.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two primary female presenters appearing in Costco and at home.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and a grey coat; the other has black hair, a black beret, and a white sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a Costco freezer aisle with commercial storage racks; second scene is a modern home kitchen with beige walls and a granite table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track features a high-energy female narration with a bright, friendly tone over an upbeat synth-pop background music loop. (2) A sharp bell chime SFX marks the mention of the product's price, followed by a quick whoosh transition as the narrator explains her repeat purchase. (3) The vocal intensity remains high with a fast speech rate as she describes the cooking process, accompanied by the mechanical click of an air fryer. (4) A whimsical cartoon popping sound effect punctuates the scene change to the finished meal, while the background music maintains a steady rhythmic pulse. (5) Subtle acoustic details include the clicking of chopsticks and minor room resonance as the speakers react positively to the food. (6) The video concludes with the narrator's enthusiastic summary and a final comedic SFX overlay, with the music track ending on a resolute beat.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a positive review and purchase recommendation for Pulmuone's frozen kimchi dumplings available at Costco, demonstrating how to cook them and verifying the taste quality.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product packaging shots, specific pricing information, and highly enthusiastic personal recommendations for a repeat purchase.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging short-form social media review that combines retail exploration with home cooking demonstration.
